  REASON_BRIEF: The symmetrical structure with two 1,2,6-trisubstituted naphthalene rings (6-bromo-2-methoxy) connected by a pentan-3-one chain matches the molecular formula, HRMS data, and the NMR features including the characteristic aromatic splitting pattern (1 singlet, 3 doublets, 1 doublet of doublets), two equivalent methoxy groups, one ketone carbonyl, and two pairs of equivalent CH2 groups.
